description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Diff view feels clunky with too much line spacing and no syntax highlighting. Goals:
1. Modern, tight, GitHub-like diff CSS (smaller line-height, better colors, optional line-number gutter).
2. Syntax highlighting per file via Prism.js (vendored locally so the artifact stays self-contained — no CDN at view time).
title: Polish v6: modern diff styling + Prism syntax highlighting
